creator: rometravelers
caption:
One of the more unexpected museum visits I had in Rome 🇮🇹

The FAO Food & Agriculture Museum & Network gives a really interesting look at global food culture, agriculture, and history in a way that feels a lot more immersive than I expected. Definitely worth adding if you want something a little different from the usual Rome itinerary.

The museum is open to the public from Monday to Friday for both group and individual visits, which can be easily booked online.
